name: nav
description: Learning project for building a coding agent.

scripts.electron:dev: bun run main:build && bun run renderer:build && electron desktop/electron/out/main.cjs
scripts.electron:smoke: bun run main:build && bun run renderer:build && electron desktop/electron/out/main.cjs --smoke
scripts.check:electron: bun run typecheck && bun run main:build && bun run renderer:build && node --test tests/*.test.cts
